title: WIHP Toktok Tul We i No Gat Mak
subtitle: Raitim wanpela tok → Kisim IPA long Wiktionary → Tanim i go long Hangul!
inputPlaceholder: Raitim wanpela tok (eksampel: Gude, Mi laikim yu...)
canConvert: Yu inap tanim tok bilong 117 tokples bilong graun, moa long 20 tokples bilong India!
philosophy: Tok i no ken gat mak. WIHP i tok tenkyu long Wiktionary IPA.
